nodes.name: Bradfield's swift
nodes.summary: Bradfield's swift (Apus bradfieldi) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Namibia, and South Africa. The common name and Latin binomial commemorate the South African naturalist R. D. Bradfield (1882–1949). References External links Bradfield's swift - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
